title: Roboclaws — Active Plan (Phase 2.4 — Map representation & view composition A/B)
summary: Detailed phase-level design spec for an A/B experiment comparing three image-input variants (baseline, structured map-v2, map-v2+chase-cam) across VLM-driven AI2-THOR games.
notes: Hybrid document: structurally a per-phase engineering plan with task breakdown, test plan, effort estimate, and failure modes. Contains PRD-like goals/non-goals (Scope/In-scope/Not-in-scope) and SPEC-like implementation contracts (API signatures, rendering contract, pose math, JSONL schema). Classified SPEC because the bulk is implementation-how (file-level task decomposition, function signatures, rendering rules, test matrix) rather than user-facing requirements or a single locked architectural decision. Not an ADR (no Decision/Consequences ending one chosen path; this is an open experiment). Confidence medium due to PRD overlap in the Scope section.
